title: Thelypteris bordenii

Traditionally, Thelypteris bordenii has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to its potential antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
